const data = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...data, confirmationMessage: 'Notion Page Created!\nTitle: ' + (data.title || 'WhatsApp Note') } }];

const data = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...data, confirmationMessage: 'Trello Card Created!\nTask: ' + (data.title || 'New Task') + '\nList: ' + (data.list || 'To Do') } }];

const data = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...data, confirmationMessage: 'Slack Message Sent!\nChannel: ' + (data.channel || '#general') } }];
